Back to catalog
BannerCompound

Dismissible contextual banner for the chat thread. Three variants — single source connect prompt, multi source browse prompt, and connected source confirmation.

Single SourceMulti SourceConnectedDismissed

Single Source

Connect Prompt
Connect your S&P Global data to Copilot
Connect to S&P Global to access verified, up-to-date financial data

Multi Source

Browse Prompt
+7
Connect your data to get more from Copilot
Connect to S&P Global, Moody's, LSEG and more to ground responses in trusted data

Connected Source

Confirmation
Your Engineering Hub is now connected to Copilot
Access docs and team knowledge from Engineering Hub in your Copilot responses.

Interactive — Click Dismiss or Action

Connect your S&P Global data to Copilot
Connect to S&P Global to access verified, up-to-date financial data
+7
Connect your data to get more from Copilot
Connect to S&P Global, Moody's, LSEG and more to ground responses in trusted data
Your Engineering Hub is now connected to Copilot
Access docs and team knowledge from Engineering Hub in your Copilot responses.
